title: Chapter
description: A major section of a module, containing sections, interactive assessments, and/or multiple choice assessments (quizzes). Chapters are stored in numbered directories within the module/ folder (e.g., module/01-chapter-name/). Each chapter directory must contain chapter.yml and description.md.

code.description: Unique identifier for this chapter. Must start and end with alphanumeric, can contain hyphens.

title.description: Display name for the chapter shown in the UI.

multipleChoiceAssessments.description: Optional array of quiz-based assessments defined inline in this chapter.yml file.

video.description: Optional URL to a chapter introduction video.

shortDescription.description: Optional brief summary of the chapter. NOTE: Currently unused by the training platform.

bannerImage.description: Optional chapter-specific header image URL. NOTE: Currently unused by the training platform.

bannerVideo.description: Optional chapter-specific banner video URL. NOTE: Currently unused by the training platform.

isDraft.description: Boolean to indicate if the chapter is a draft. Set to false for published chapters.

examples.title: The Delivery Unit
examples.shortDescription: Learn what a delivery unit is and how it fits into modern software architecture

multipleChoiceAssessments.title: Functional Testing Fundamentals Quiz
multipleChoiceAssessments.description: Test your understanding of functional testing principles
